Statement: Contract award and CCDC 14-2013 contract execution is required before Prime Contractor Designation Form can be executed and before work commences.
EvidenceQuote: "Contract award / selection as successful Proponent — Required before Prime Contractor Designation Form can be executed"
Notes: FACT. Procedure Prerequisites state contract award required before designation form execution (RFP §2.15). CCDC 14-2013 contract must be signed prior to commencing work (RFP §2.7).

TargetLocation: Camrose County — Prime Contractor Designation Form
Statement: Prime Contractor Designation Form must be obtained from Camrose County; Proponent cannot self-generate this form.
EvidenceQuote: "Prime Contractor Designation Form available from Camrose County — County issues the form; Proponent cannot self-generate"
Notes: FACT. County-issued form is a required external input; contact is Darren King per RFP §1.3.4. Proponent has no control over form availability timing.

Statement: Insurance Certificates with Camrose County named as additional insured are required before contract execution and must be maintained throughout the project.
EvidenceQuote: "Insurance Certificates with Camrose County named as additional insured — Required before contract execution"
Notes: FACT. Insurance is a prerequisite for contract execution and an ongoing obligation. REQ-019-01-006 specifies minimum $5M CGL and other coverages.

TargetName: Appendix A — Contractor Health and Safety Pre-Qualification Evaluation
Statement: Completed Appendix A form with all supporting documentation is a required input for the H&S Pre-Qualification submission at proposal stage.
EvidenceQuote: "The Proponent shall submit a completed Contractor Health and Safety Pre-Qualification Evaluation form (Appendix A)"
Notes: FACT. Appendix A (R-03) is a County-provided form template that must be completed with supporting documentation. Required at proposal stage per RFP §4.9.
